title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.120 - Tax rate limits
text:
92.120.  Tax rate limits. — The tax on salaries, wages, commissions and other compensation of individuals, subject to tax, and on the net profits or earnings of associations, businesses or other activities, and corporations, subject to tax, shall not be in excess of one percent per annum.
(Reenacted L. 1953 2d Ex. Sess. p. 14 § 4, A.L. 1959 S.B. 27)
